overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking along a rainy wooden dock or pier. The character moves past rustic wooden shacks and hanging boats, proceeds under a covered walkway with lanterns, and continues onto an open pier extension over choppy water before stopping at the end and turning back toward the shore.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet wooden dock past the shack wall toward a covered section

entered.detail: weathered wooden wall of a rustic dockside shack with corrugated metal roof
small wooden boat suspended from a rope and pulley system over the water
tall wooden A-frame structure with pulley system used for hoisting boats
lit lantern hanging from wooden post providing warm light in the rain
wet wooden planks of the dock walkway glistening with rain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked wooden dock beside a rustic wooden shack. A small boat hangs from a wooden frame with a pulley system on the right, and lanterns hang from wooden posts. Rain falls steadily as the character moves forward toward a covered section of the walkway.

events.description: moves from open dock into covered walkway section with overhead roof
enters covered area where lighting becomes significantly darker and sheltered from rain

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered roof of the dock walkway, protected from the rain

entered.detail: wooden roof structure overhead providing shelter from the rain
thick wooden support posts holding up the covered roof structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered section of the dock, where the roof blocks the rain and sky, creating a darker, sheltered environment. Wooden support beams line the sides as the walkway continues over the water, with the lighting noticeably dimmer than the open dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier extension over choppy water

events.description: exits covered walkway onto open pier extension surrounded by water
emerges from cover back into open rainy environment with natural light

agents.ego_description: walking along the open pier with choppy water visible on both sides, heading toward the distant end

entered.detail: thick rope railings strung between wooden posts along the pier edge
vertical wooden posts supporting the rope railings along the pier
dark choppy water with visible waves and rain splashing on the surface
tree-covered hills and forested shoreline visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character continues along an open wooden pier extension surrounded by choppy water. Rope railings and wooden posts line the sides, with a forested shoreline visible in the distance through the heavy rain. The character moves steadily toward the end of the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of pier with view back to dock buildings

events.description: character stops at end of pier, turns around to face back toward shore
begins walking back toward the dock buildings and covered walkway

agents.ego_description: stops at the pier end to look around at the water, then turns and walks back toward the wooden shacks

entered.detail: rustic wooden dock building with stairs and corrugated roof coming back into view
wooden staircase leading up to the dock building platform

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the pier, pauses to look out at the choppy water, then turns around and begins walking back toward the shore. The wooden shacks and dock structures come back into view on the left as the character returns along the rain-soaked planks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked wooden dock that transitions from a rustic shoreline into a sheltered walkway before extending over open, choppy water. It begins beside a wooden shack and a pulley-suspended boat, moving through steady rain under glowing lanterns toward a covered section of the pier. As the character enters this sheltered area, the environment shifts into a darker, enclosed space framed by wooden support beams that block out the sky. The scene then opens back up as the camera emerges from the cover onto an exposed pier extension, moving past rope railings toward a distant, forested shoreline through the heavy downpour. Finally, upon reaching the end of the pier, the character pauses over the churning water before turning around to retrace their steps back toward the wooden shacks and the shore.
